node.text: Dave got picked for a car mod workshop and is excited about learning auto engineering and building a custom car.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "workshop picked August 11 2023") on Session 13 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave has been doing engine swaps, suspension modifications, and is now learning about body modifications on a classic muscle car.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "workshop picked August 11 2023") on Session 13 (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "picked for workshop") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.94)

node.text: Dave aims to give the classic muscle car a modern twist while maintaining a classic vibe.
